Why FuelIQ

India switched to E20. Your mileage quietly dropped — and so did your wallet.

When pumps moved from E10 to 20% ethanol blend, fuel economy fell. The change is small per tank, but it compounds every month into real money. Most drivers never see the number.

FuelIQ turns that invisible cost into clear, personalised figures — grounded in your actual vehicle, your real driving, and sourced efficiency data from NITI Aayog and ARAI.

2–7%Typical mileage drop on E20
₹1,000sExtra fuel cost per year
100%Calculated in your browser

😤 The problem

  • ✕ You're paying more per kilometre but have no idea how much.
  • ✕ Generic "E20 reduces mileage by X%" headlines don't reflect your car.
  • ✕ No easy way to track your real-world mileage over time.
  • ✕ Comparing vehicles, blends, or trips means spreadsheets and guesswork.
  • ✕ Fuel apps want logins, upload your data, and bury you in ads.
Powerful Features

Everything you need to manage fuel smarter

One offline-first application, fifteen focused tools — from precise cost math to real-world tracking and professional reporting.

E20 Impact Calculator

See exact mileage loss, extra cost per km, and monthly/yearly impact from switching to E20.

Vehicle Profiles

Save cars, bikes & scooters by make and model with reference images and fuel type.

Fuel & Mileage Log

Enter what you paid — litres auto-calculate. Track real full-to-full measured mileage over time.

Smart Insights

Rule-based recommendations that flag when logged mileage differs from your estimate — and why.

Calculation History

Every calculation saved, searchable, and one click to restore — compare scenarios instantly.

Budget Planner

Enter a rupee amount and see exactly how far it takes you — before vs after E20.

Trip Planner

One-way or round-trip fuel cost for any journey, using your current mileage and price.

Vehicle Comparison

Put two saved vehicles side by side under identical assumptions and see which costs less.

Fuel Blend Comparison

E0, E10, E20 & E85 side by side on mileage and cost-per-km using an energy-density model.

PDF & Print Reports

Generate a polished, chart-rich report — vehicle details, KPIs, comparisons and insights.

CSV Export

Export all inputs, results, and insights to a spreadsheet-ready file with correct ₹ formatting.

Advanced Mode

Fine-tune for city/highway, traffic, AC, tyre pressure, driving style and load.

Ownership Dashboard

Project your E20 cost forward — spent so far, plus 1, 3 and 5-year estimates.

CO₂ Estimator

Tailpipe CO₂ before vs after E20, on a transparent fossil-carbon basis.

Share & Backup

Share results via link or WhatsApp, and export a full JSON backup of all your data.

Light & Dark Mode

A crafted theme for both modes, remembered automatically between visits.

How It Works

From guesswork to a clear number in three steps

1

Add your vehicle

Pick your car, bike or scooter and enter your real mileage — or let the fuel log measure it for you.

→
2

See the impact

Instantly view mileage loss, cost per km, and monthly & yearly impact with live charts and insights.

→
3

Decide & export

Compare vehicles or blends, plan trips, then export a professional PDF or CSV report.

Why E20 Matters

The science, made simple

FuelIQ doesn't just quote a headline number — it explains the chemistry and grounds every estimate in sourced data.

⚗️

It's chemistry, not a defect

Ethanol carries less energy per litre than petrol (~21 MJ/L vs ~32 MJ/L). Blend in 20% and the engine burns a little more to go the same distance — confirmed by the IEA and US DOE.

📊

Grounded in real testing

Efficiency-drop ranges come from NITI Aayog's ethanol roadmap and ARAI's 2026 fleet testing — 1–2% for E20-ready cars, up to 6–7% for older engines.

🚗

Personalised to you

Instead of a one-size-fits-all figure, FuelIQ applies the right range to your vehicle, your driving conditions, and your measured mileage.

🌱

Honest about limits

CO₂ is shown on a transparent tailpipe basis; blend comparisons use a clearly-labelled energy model. No hidden assumptions, no overstated claims.

Intelligent Insights

It doesn't just calculate — it tells you what matters

Every result is accompanied by plain-language insights generated from your own numbers.

💡 Insight

A 6.0% mileage drop is typical for E20 — within ARAI's 2026 fleet-testing range for a mixed-age fleet (2–6%).

💸 Cost

At 400 km/month, E20 costs you roughly ₹853.81 extra a year — about the same as 8 litres of petrol at today's price.

🔍 Accuracy

Your logged real-world mileage (55.6 km/L) differs from what you entered (40.0 km/L) by ~39%. Using the logged figure gives a more accurate estimate.

Questions

Frequently asked

Is FuelIQ really free?+
Yes — completely free and open source. No account, no subscription, no ads. You can even self-host it or fork the code on GitHub.
Is my data private?+
Entirely. Every vehicle, fuel log, and calculation is stored only in your browser's local storage. Nothing is uploaded to any server — the only outbound requests are optional vehicle-image lookups and share links, which run only when you trigger them.
Does it work offline?+
Yes. FuelIQ is an installable PWA. After your first visit it works fully offline — install it to your home screen and it behaves like a native app.
How accurate are the calculations?+
The efficiency-drop ranges are drawn from NITI Aayog's ethanol roadmap and ARAI's 2026 fleet testing. Results are estimates that depend on the values you enter — the more accurate your real-world mileage, the more accurate the numbers.
Which vehicles are supported?+
Cars, motorcycles and scooters across popular Indian manufacturers, with a curated make/model list. You can save unlimited vehicle profiles.

Stop guessing what fuel
is costing you.

Open FuelIQ and get your personalised number in under a minute. Free, offline, and private.
